title: Common Trading Mistakes
author: Larosky4
selftext:
I used to be one of those traders who could spot a decent setup but still struggled with discipline. I would size too big, enter too early, chase moves, ignore risk, revenge trade, and fail to review what went wrong. The setup was not always the problem. The missing piece was structure

Candlestick TradePal builds a precise plan that gives you that edge to decide while managing risk properly in any market.

If you’re serious about becoming consistent, it’s worth trying alongside what you’re already learning!

comments.author: Odd_Fan3570
comments.body: But since last few yrs following a plan is also not making you enough money bcoz of regular change in regulations.
